# EPIC: TRI-NET 2026 Scientific Improvement Plan — γ-surface

> γ-side execution view of the line-wide *TRI-NET 2026 Scientific
> Improvement Plan*. Authoritative content lives in
> [`SCIENTIFIC_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md`](../../SCIENTIFIC_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md);
> this file is the **issue-tracker entry point** that fans out to the
> 16 sub-items.

## R5-honest preamble — issue numbering

The `#0`, `#1`, … numbers used in this directory and in
`create_issues.sh` are **local plan identifiers**, not GitHub issue
numbers. No GitHub issue exists for any item in this pack until
`create_issues.sh` is run by a maintainer with write access and the
resulting issue URLs are pasted back here. Anywhere this directory
references "the issue", read it as "the *planned* issue described by
this markdown file".

The 16 sub-items map 1-to-1 onto the plan IDs in
[`SCIENTIFIC_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md`](../../SCIENTIFIC_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md)
(CL-01..CL-04, EN-01..EN-03, SN-01..SN-03, PUB-01..PUB-03, OS-01..OS-03).

## How to materialise these as real GitHub issues

This pack is **not auto-applied**. To create the 16 issues plus the
EPIC issue, a maintainer with `gh` auth and write access to this repo
runs:

```bash
# 1. Inspect what would be created — no network calls:
bash .github/issues/create_issues.sh --dry-run

# 2. Actually create the issues:
bash .github/issues/create_issues.sh
```

See [`ISSUES_SUMMARY.md`](ISSUES_SUMMARY.md) for the create-script
contract and the labels it expects to exist in the repo.

## Scope guardrails (R5)

This EPIC and its sub-items inherit the honesty constraints from
[`SCIENTIFIC_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md`](../../SCIENTIFIC_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md)
§9:

- No DARPA acceptance / award / funding figure asserted.
- No programme calendar date, paper-acceptance date, or silicon
  return date asserted.
- No `1000×` or `4000` TOPS/W claim asserted as γ-side fact —
  treated as `projection` only.
- Headline `75 / 405` TOPS/W remain SKY130A pre-silicon estimates
  (unchanged from `STATUS.md`).
- RBB / CAP_BOOST remain witness-only crates on γ today (see
  [`TRIPLE_DECK_STATUS.md`](../../TRIPLE_DECK_STATUS.md)).
